title: Watch Republican ex-Georgia Lt. Gov. reject Trump at DNC speech
shortDescription: Former Republican Lt. Gov Geoff Duncan became the latest GOP defector to take the stage at the DNC convention to denounce Donald Trump. Watch it here

title: Activist Jessica Mackler decries GOP abortion bans in DNC speech
shortDescription: Jessica Mackler's DNC speech targets GOP abortion restrictions, highlighting Project 2025 and rallying Democrats for the 2024 election fight.

title: Josh Shapiro fights back against Trump's antisemitism talking point
shortDescription: Donald Trump says Kamala Harris didn't choose Josh Shapiro as her running mate 'because he's Jewish.' Shapiro condemns Trump's comments.

title: RFK Jr. wants administration job in return for endorsing Trump
shortDescription: RFK Jr. is reportedly in talks to drop out and endorse Trump. Sources say that depends if he can secure a spot in a Trump administration.

title: Democratic convention puts Trump on defense over legal troubles
shortDescription: Donald Trump has made history with his four criminal cases. Democrats have made sure to talk about that during their Chicago convention.
